description_long: This is a vintage-style female doll dressed in a muted brown skirt and blouse ensemble, featuring a prominent white lace collar and a long beaded necklace. The doll's facial features are delicately painted, with short, side-parted hair and a neutral expression. She holds a small object in her right hand and a clutch or purse in her left, adding to her period-appropriate appearance. The shoes are simple and match the overall subdued color palette, while the legs are straight and the arms are positioned close to the body. The clothing and accessories evoke early 20th-century fashion, reminiscent of the 1920s or 1930s. The surface appears matte and slightly textured, suggesting a composition of painted ceramic or composite material.
description: A vintage female doll in a brown skirt and blouse with a white lace collar, holding a purse and a small object, styled in early 20th-century fashion.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, lace collar, necklace, and both accessories in her hands.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the head, the layered skirt, and the alignment of the arms close to the body.
description_view_2: Three-quarter front view revealing more detail of the doll's facial features, necklace, and the objects in her hands.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the head, the seam of the blouse, and the back of the skirt and legs.
attribute_clothing_style: Early 20th-century women's fashion with a brown knee-length skirt, matching blouse, white lace collar, and a long beaded necklace; simple flat shoes and a small clutch purse complete the look.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms bent at the elbows, right hand holding a small object, left hand holding a purse, legs straight and close together, head facing forward.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with closed lips, wide eyes, and relaxed eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight, side-parted brown hair styled close to the head.
